stemHtml: Why are proper procedures required for ground de-icing and anti-icing of an aeroplane?

options.a: To ensure effective removal of ice and snow deposits by following established methods.
options.b: To make sure that the fuselage is clean, with NO residues of de-icing or anti-icing fluids.
options.c: To make sure that ice and snow deposits are only removed from critical areas.
options.d: To satisfy the requirements of the Competent Authority.
